title: LANE COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: LANE COMMUNITY COLLEGE LANE COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transfer degrees, 40+ career technical programs, and a variety of non-credit courses. Academic counseling and Career Information System (CIS), which lists job occupations of interest are offered as well. Provides career planning, academic, and personal advising, adult basic education, various instructional programs, disability services, telecourses, and distance learning. 4000 E 30th Avenue Building 24 Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 463-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 463-3000 Admissions Office (541) 463-5678 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies, financial assistance available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Served by bus Routes 81 (LCC/Hilyard), 82 (LCC/Pearl), 85 (LCC/Springfield), 92 (Lowell/LCC), and 98 (Cottage Grove) Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC SAFETY - QUALITY CARE CONNECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COMMUNITY COLLEGE
